seoTitle: How to Enable Missed Call Textback in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to turn on Missed Call Textback in GoHighLevel so no potential client is left without a response after an unanswered call.
intro: Missed Call Textback automatically sends a text to anyone whose call you couldn't answer, keeping the conversation alive instead of losing the opportunity entirely. This guide covers accessing the settings, configuring the feature, and understanding the real-world benefits for client communication. It's aimed at small business owners, marketing agencies, and freelancers who want to stay responsive even when they can't pick up the phone.

steps.heading: Access the GoHighLevel settings
steps.body: Go to the section of GoHighLevel where communication features like Missed Call Textback are configured.

steps.heading: Configure the Missed Call Textback feature
steps.body: Follow the setup steps to turn on automatic text responses for calls that go unanswered.

steps.heading: Understand the benefits of automated text response
steps.body: This feature helps ensure potential clients receive a prompt response even when you're unable to answer the phone directly.

steps.heading: Integrate with existing workflows
steps.body: Connect the textback feature with your broader automation setup so follow-ups continue smoothly after the initial text is sent.

steps.heading: Apply real-world business scenarios
steps.body: Consider how this feature supports better engagement across different business types, from client-facing agencies to solo freelancers.

faq.question: Does Missed Call Textback work automatically once enabled?
faq.answer: Yes, once configured, it automatically sends a text message to the caller whenever a call goes unanswered.

faq.question: Can I customize the text message that gets sent?
faq.answer: GoHighLevel's settings generally allow you to configure the text response to fit your business's tone and needs.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for freelancers, not just larger businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, freelancers and solo business owners can benefit just as much, since it helps maintain client communication even when they can't answer calls.

faq.question: Does this feature work with existing automation workflows?
faq.answer: Yes, it's designed to integrate with your broader GoHighLevel automation setup for continued follow-up after the initial text.

faq.question: What happens if I miss the same caller multiple times?
faq.answer: The specific behavior can depend on your configuration, so it's worth reviewing your setup if you want to avoid repeated texts to the same caller.
